backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Post and Comment types with CRUD operations for blog posts and comments, storing data in Maps with auto-incrementing IDs and timestamps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (homepage, post detail, comments, create/edit/delete) to their corresponding frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using warm earth tones (browns, creams, terracotta) for the family blog theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Family Blog application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for home, post detail, create post, and edit post pages, all wrapped in a Layout component.
frontend/src/components/CommentForm.tsx: Form component for adding comments with author name and text fields, validation, loading states, and integration with useAddComment mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/CommentList.tsx: Displays a list of comments with author names and formatted timestamps, or shows an empty state message when no comments exist.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDialog.ts: Reusable AlertDialog component for confirming destructive actions like deletion, with loading state support and cancel/confirm buttons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with header banner image, site title, navigation buttons, main content area, and footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Card component displaying post preview with optional featured image, title, author, date, and excerpt with hover effects and link to full post.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality, managing identity state and delegation validation with AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on posts and comments, including fetching all posts, individual posts, comments, and mutations for creating, updating, and deleting posts.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm color palette theme (cream, brown, terracotta) for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx: Page component with a form for creating new blog posts with title, author, content, and optional featured image fields, using the useCreatePost mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/EditPostPage.tsx: Page component for editing existing blog posts, pre-populating form fields with current post data and using the useUpdatePost mutation hook to save changes.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying all blog posts in a grid layout with a welcome header and family placeholder image, showing loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single blog post with full content, author, timestamp, and featured image, along with edit/delete buttons and a comment section. Includes a confirmation dialog for post deletion and handles loading/error states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography and animation plugins, and extended theme settings for a family blog aesthetic with warm tones and custom shadows.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting completed features for a family blog application including homepage, post detail pages, comments, CRUD operations, and warm family-oriented visual design with earth tones.
